rulings.Case Title: 547-551 HAYES LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. PUBLIC BIKES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Public Bikes
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 26, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF 547-551 HAYES LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Application For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment As To Public Bikes is DENIED. No Proof of Service for the Application on file in violation of CRC 3.1300(c). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRENT MARSH VS. MICHAEL CAMPESINO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees In Contract Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 26, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CAMPESINO Notice Of motion and motion For Attorneys' Fees In Contract Action is DENIED. Attorneys' fees are barred under Civil Code § 1717, subdivision (b)(2). =(501/REQ)
